auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in with your email and password.
auth.registerSubtitle: Create a new account to get started.
auth.apiKeyNote: No API key required. You can add one later from Settings.
auth.emailPasswordRequired: Please enter your email and password
auth.connectionFailed: Cannot connect to server. Please make sure the backend is running.
auth.googleOAuthNotReady: Google login failed. Please try again.
auth.googleOAuthNotConfigured: Google OAuth is not configured. Set GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID and GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET in Settings or .env file.
auth.googleOAuthTimeout: Google login timed out. Please try again.
auth.startWithoutLoginNote: Login enables state sync across multiple devices

backend.takingLonger: Startup is taking longer than expected. Please wait...
backend.firstRunNote: First launch setup may take a few minutes
backend.startupFailed: Backend startup failed. Press "Retry" to try again.
backend.checkBackend: Please check if the backend API (port 18234) is running.

brand.feature1Desc: Coordinate multiple AIs as an organization

language.title: Choose your language
language.description: Select the language for Zero-Employee Orchestrator. This language will be used for the UI and AI instructions. You can change it later in Settings.
language.aiLanguageDesc: The language AI agents will use in their responses

welcome.title: Welcome to Zero-Employee Orchestrator
welcome.description:
This wizard will guide you through the basic setup of your AI organization.

Simply describe your tasks in natural language, and the AI team will plan, execute, and verify — all under your approval.

No expertise required. Let's set things up step by step.
highlights: Just describe your tasks in natural language — no coding needed
AI team automatically plans, executes, and verifies quality
Critical actions always require your approval
Full transparency with cost tracking & audit logs
welcome.templatesSubtitle: Select a template to get started in under 10 minutes
welcome.templateContentOpsDesc: Blog/SNS content creation pipeline with review and publish approval gate
welcome.templateSalesResearchDesc: Competitor analysis, market research, lead scoring with data verification
welcome.templateFaqKbDesc: Customer support automation with human escalation
welcome.templateMeetingTasksDesc: Meeting notes to action items to ticket creation with assignment
welcome.templatePrePublishReviewDesc: Content/code/document review with multi-model cross-check (Judge Layer)

organization.title: Organization Setup
organization.description: Set up your AI organization's name and mission. You can change these later.
organization.missionPlaceholder: e.g. Achieve efficient operations with AI
organization.tipDescription: The organization name is shown on the dashboard and audit logs. You can use your company name, project name, or team name.

provider.title: AI Provider Setup
provider.description:
Choose how to connect to AI models. You can change or add more providers later in Settings.
You can skip this step and try the UI without an API key.
provider.openrouterDesc: Access many AI models with one key
provider.localDesc: Use Ollama — no API key, completely free
provider.skipDesc: Start by exploring the UI first

agent.title: Your First AI Agent
agent.description: Create your first AI agent. This agent will serve as the main contact for your tasks and will organize other agents as needed.
agent.cap1: Accept task requests in natural language
agent.cap5: Submit requests for actions that need approval
agent.safetyNote: * Sending, publishing, billing, and other critical actions always require your approval

complete.title: Setup Complete!
complete.description:
Your AI organization is ready.

Head to the dashboard and describe a task in natural language. The AI team will draft a plan and execute it under your approval.
complete.try1: "Analyze our competitors and write a report"
complete.try2: "Create a social media posting plan for this month"

dashboard.inputPlaceholder: e.g. Design an onboarding flow for new customers
dashboard.noMission: No mission set yet. Register one from Settings.
dashboard.noErrors: No errors or blocked tasks at this time.
dashboard.templateContentOpsDesc: Blog/SNS content pipeline with review and publish approval
dashboard.templateSalesResearchDesc: Competitor analysis, market research, lead scoring
dashboard.templateFaqKbDesc: Customer support automation with human escalation
dashboard.templateMeetingTasksDesc: Meeting notes to action items to ticket creation
dashboard.templatePrePublishReviewDesc: Multi-model cross-check for content, code, or docs
dashboard.inputHint: Ask anything in natural language. File operations, browser control, AI analysis, and more.
dashboard.qaResearchEx: Research the latest trends in our industry
dashboard.qaReportEx: Analyze this month's sales data and create a report
dashboard.qaAutomateEx: Auto-draft social media posts every Monday
dashboard.qaAnalyzeEx: Classify customer feedback and extract improvements
dashboard.welcomeDesc: Describe your business tasks in natural language. Your AI team will plan, execute, verify, and deliver — all under your approval.

settings.title: Settings
settings.aiLanguageDesc: The language AI agents will use in their responses
settings.languageRestartHint: Some features may require a restart to fully apply the language change.
settings.languageAiNote: Language changes also affect AI agent output in new conversations.
settings.apiKeysDesc: Set API keys here instead of editing the .env file directly.
settings.modeQualityDesc: Use highest quality models (API key required)
settings.modeSpeedDesc: Use fast lightweight models (API key required)
settings.ollamaAutoDetect: Automatically detected if Ollama is installed.
settings.autonomyDesc: Observe: Read-only / Assist: Suggestions only / Semi-Auto: Execute after approval / Autonomous: Auto-execute within safe boundaries
settings.webAiSession: Web AI sessions (use AI without API keys)
settings.siteInteraction: Site interaction (account registration, form filling, etc.)
settings.browserDesc: AI can control Chrome and other browsers to use web-based GPT/Gemini/Claude, execute site tasks, and gather information. Dangerous operations require approval.
settings.workspaceDesc: By default, only internal storage is used. Enable local file or cloud access here.
settings.integrationStrategy: ZEO acts as the judgment, approval, and audit layer.
settings.integrationStrategyDesc: Connect external tools for execution. Works with n8n, Zapier, Make, and MCP.

heartbeats.title: Health Monitor
heartbeats.description: Set up policies to periodically check the health of your systems and agents. Automatic notifications and recovery on anomaly detection.
heartbeats.emptyPolicies: No monitoring policies configured yet. Add periodic health checks.

secretary.title: Secretary
secretary.subtitle: Dump your thoughts, ideas, and to-dos — let AI organize them
secretary.inputPlaceholder: Dump your thoughts, ideas, daily to-dos... anything goes
secretary.empty: No brain dumps yet. Start by dumping your thoughts above.

orgSetup.secretaryOnlyTip: Recommended if you want to keep things simple. You can add departments later.
orgSetup.trySecretaryDesc: From the "Secretary" menu, dump your thoughts and ideas. The more data you accumulate, the better AI suggestions become.
orgSetup.generatedDesc: Departments, teams, and agents have been created. View them in the Org Chart.

skills.title: Skills
skills.emptyState: No skills registered yet. Create new skills using natural language.

extensions.title: Extensions
extensions.marketplaceDesc: Download user-created extensions. Themes, language packs, tool integrations, and more coming soon.

brainstorm.title: Brainstorm
brainstorm.subtitle: Brainstorm with AI and compare responses across multiple models. Freely configure agent roles and models.
brainstorm.selectOrCreate: Select or create a brainstorm session
brainstorm.compareDesc: Send the same input to multiple models and compare their responses side by side.
brainstorm.selectModels: Select models to compare (2 or more)
brainstorm.rolesDesc: Configure which AI model each agent role uses.
brainstorm.noRoleModels: No model settings yet. Configure via API.
brainstorm.agentsDesc: Describe your requests in natural language to add, remove, or change agent roles.
brainstorm.orgRequestPlaceholder: e.g. "Add a consultant agent", "Change the secretary model to Claude Opus"
brainstorm.secretaryDesc: Acts as bridge between the AI organization and user. Stores system information, files, and conversation knowledge to assist the user.
brainstorm.consultantDesc: Supports the user with advice and brainstorming. Provides multi-perspective insights and connects users with the secretary.

audit.title: Audit Log
audit.searchPlaceholder: Search by actor, target, trace ID...
audit.emptyState: No audit logs yet. System operations will appear here as they are recorded.

costs.title: Cost Management
costs.budgetDesc: Set a budget limit to automatically pause tasks when costs reach the threshold.
costs.breakdownHint: Cost breakdown by model and ticket will appear after task execution.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.subtitle: Discover and install community-created skills, plugins, and extensions.
marketplace.comingSoonDesc: A marketplace for publishing and downloading user-created skills, plugins, and extensions is in development. Themes, language packs, tool integrations, and AI skills will be available.

releases.title: Downloads
releases.subtitle: Download the latest Zero-Employee Orchestrator
releases.quickDownloadDesc: Download the installer for your OS
releases.feature1Desc: Just describe tasks in everyday language and your AI team plans & executes
releases.feature2Desc: Design interviews, orchestration, quality judging, and re-proposals — seamlessly
releases.feature3Desc: WebSocket-powered real-time notifications and progress monitoring
releases.feature4Desc: Critical actions require human approval for safety
releases.feature5Desc: Automatic versioning of artifacts with change tracking
releases.feature6Desc: Full operation logging and encrypted data protection
releases.feature7Desc: Extend AI capabilities with custom skill registration & sharing
releases.feature8Desc: Real-time AI model cost tracking and budget management
releases.installStep1: 1. Download the installer for your OS using the button above
releases.installStep2: 2. Run the downloaded file to install
releases.installStep3: 3. Launch the app and sign up or log in with Google
releases.installStep4: 4. Follow the setup wizard to choose your language and AI provider
releases.installStep5: 5. Go to the dashboard and describe your first task
releases.reqNetwork: Network: Internet connection (for AI model access)

ticketList.title: Tickets
ticketList.emptyState: No tickets yet. Create a ticket by submitting a request from the Dashboard.

ticketDetail.noMessages: No messages in this ticket yet.
ticketDetail.noSpecPlan: No spec or plan has been created yet.
ticketDetail.noTasks: No tasks have been assigned yet.
ticketDetail.noAgents: No agents have been assigned yet.

agentMonitor.title: Agent Monitor Dashboard
agentMonitor.subtitle: Monitor agent status in real-time from the browser
agentMonitor.killSwitchConfirm: Are you sure you want to activate the emergency kill switch? This will stop ALL active executions.
agentMonitor.noApprovals: No pending approvals. All operations are running within approved boundaries.
agentMonitor.noTraces: No reasoning traces yet. Traces appear when agents execute tasks.

interview.title: Design Interview
interview.subtitle: Deep-dive into requirements to build a foundation for the execution plan
interview.qObjective: What is the ultimate goal of this task?
interview.qConstraints: Are there any constraints to follow? (budget, deadline, quality standards, etc.)
interview.qRisk: Are there any anticipated risks or concerns?
interview.qPriority: What is the priority level? (High / Medium / Low)
interview.qApproval: Are there any steps that require human approval?
interview.qExternalService: Is connection or transmission to external services required?
interview.qAcceptance: What are the completion criteria (acceptance criteria)?

specPlan.title: Spec & Plan
specPlan.noDag: Task dependency graph has not been generated yet.

skillCreate.description: Describe the skill's functionality in natural language. AI will automatically generate the skill manifest and execution code. Generated code can be registered after passing safety checks.
skillCreate.placeholder:
Examples:
- A skill that periodically scrapes competitor websites and reports price changes
- A skill that converts Markdown files to HTML and auto-generates a table of contents
- A skill that performs sentiment analysis on text and classifies it as positive/negative/neutral

artifacts.emptyState: No artifacts yet. Results from ticket execution will appear here.

updater.installingVersion: Installing v{version}. The app will restart shortly.
updater.autoUpdateDesc: Automatically download and install updates when available
